text: Elena catered our Sunday chili for the fellowship hall - flawless.
Casa Flores made altar arrangements for Advent - Frank was moved to tears.
Audio Express set up for our concert, amps were clean and clear.
Best conchas in El Paso. Better than my own bread some days.
Best dried damiana selection in the region.
Moya's is the real deal - my curandera grandmother would approve.
Full altar supplies and good rue in season.
Dr. Ramirez has watched me from age 41 to 61 - trust her completely.
Dr. Vasquez explains bifocals in ways I actually understand.
Dr. Nakamura is patient with my recession issues.
Convenient for Metformin refills. Line is fast.
Arturo rests here. Section 14, row 7, plot 42. Cleaned every 15th.
Mateo loves the T-Rex fossil display.
Isabella is in third grade and the teachers are kind.
